name: Third party truck hit me at work in Draper, sue them too?

mainEntity.name: Third party truck hit me at work in Draper, sue them too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, sue third-party for negligence after notifying comp insurer.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, pursue third-party negligence claim alongside workers' comp for extras like pain/suffering; notify comp insurer first.[4] Comp covers basics, third-party adds uncapped damages.[4] Key factors: (1) Prove negligence caused injury; (2) Insurer gets lien on recovery; (3) No suit against employer; (4) Evidence of breach/damages.[4] Identify at-fault party/insurer, inform comp carrier immediately. Dual claims maximize recovery.

description: Yes, sue third-party for negligence after notifying comp insurer.[4]
